requirements.summary: Identify and fix the bug causing 18 panels to be incorrectly removed or filtered from the comic viewer display
acceptanceCriteria: All 18 previously missing panels are now visible in the comic viewer
No panels are incorrectly filtered or hidden due to deduplication or other logic
Progressive rendering displays the complete story without missing content

file_operations.description: Fix the bug causing 18 panels to be incorrectly removed from the display. Review the progressive rendering logic, deduplication integration, and panel filtering to identify where panels are being inadvertently excluded. Ensure all panels from COMIC_DATA are rendered without any unintended filtering. Verify that the deduplication feature only affects text content within panels and never removes entire panels from the display.

Ensure deduplication utilities only remove duplicate text content and never cause entire panels to be excluded from rendering. Verify that deduplicatePanels and related functions preserve all panel structures and only modify text content within panel parts. Confirm the logic does not inadvertently filter out panels during the deduplication process.

Verify that progressive rendering logic correctly includes all panels from the input array without skipping or filtering any panels. Ensure the batching mechanism increments properly and doesn't cap the panel count prematurely, allowing all 18 missing panels to be restored in the progressive render queue.

requirements.summary: Verify that all chapters in COMIC_DATA render their complete panel sets without any panels being inadvertently filtered out
acceptanceCriteria: Each chapter displays all its defined panels from comicData.ts
No logic in ComicViewer.tsx, deduplication.ts, or progressive rendering inadvertently removes panels
Total panel count matches the expected count from COMIC_DATA

file_operations.description: Add validation to ensure the total number of rendered panels matches the expected count from COMIC_DATA. Implement a check that compares the flattened panel array length against the rendered panel count and log any discrepancies. Ensure chapter boundaries and panel iteration logic don't skip or exclude any panels during the rendering process.

Add a utility function to calculate and export the expected total panel count across all chapters. This will serve as the source of truth for validation in ComicViewer.tsx to confirm no panels are missing from the display.

requirements.summary: Ensure the repetition removal feature only removes duplicate text content and never removes entire panels from the display
acceptanceCriteria: Repetition removal only affects text content within panels, not panel visibility
All 18 missing panels are restored regardless of repetition removal toggle state
Panel structure and layout remain intact when deduplication is enabled

file_operations.description: Refactor deduplication functions to guarantee they never filter out entire panel objects. Ensure deduplicatePanels returns the same number of panel objects as the input, with only text content modified within panel parts. Add safeguards to prevent panel-level filtering and preserve all panel structures regardless of text content.

Ensure the repetition removal toggle integration only affects text content rendering within panels and never controls panel visibility or filtering. Verify that when repetition removal is enabled or disabled, the same set of panels is always rendered, with only text content changes occurring within the panel parts.
